name: Zr Frijoles (Mexican Beans)
recipeInstructions:
Meats should include only one of the following: Salt Pork, Ham Hock, or diced bacon.
- Soak beans in water overnight.
- Add meat to a large pot and cook on low heat until tender (about 30 minutes).
- Drain and rinse the beans, then add them to the pot with enough water to cover by at least 2 inches.
- Stir in onion, garlic, chili powder, cumin, and oregano.
- Bring mixture to a simmer over low heat. Cook, stirring occasionally, until the liquid is absorbed and the mixture is thick (at least 4 hours).
- Add salt to taste if using meat other than Salt Pork.
